nasb.text: Though if water is put on the seed and a part of their carcass falls on it, it is unclean to you.

esv.text: but if water is put on the seed and any part of their carcass falls on it, it is unclean to you.

cnv.text: 但是，如果種子已經澆了水，牠們屍體的一部分才掉在種子上面，你們應以這種子為不潔淨。

ccb.text: 但如果它们的尸体碰到泡过水的种子，种子就不洁净。
